ns0:entry.ns0:title: AlDanial/cloc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AlDanial/cloc
Language: perl
cloc counts blank lines, comment lines, and physical lines of source code in many programming languages.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Difegue/LANraragi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Difegue/LANraragi
Language: perl
Web application for archival and reading of manga/doujinshi. Lightweight and Docker-ready for NAS/servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gaius-Augustus/BRAKER
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gaius-Augustus/BRAKER
Language: perl
BRAKER is a pipeline for fully automated prediction of protein coding gene structures with GeneMark-ES/ET/EP/ETP and AUGUSTUS in novel eukaryotic genomes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: acl-org/ACLPUB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/acl-org/ACLPUB
Language: perl
The official tool for creating proceedings for conferences of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: adrienverge/openfortivpn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adrienverge/openfortivpn
Language: perl
Client for PPP+TLS VPN tunnel services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: brendangregg/FlameGraph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/brendangregg/FlameGraph
Language: perl
Stack trace visualizer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: centreon/centreon-plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/centreon/centreon-plugins
Language: perl
Collection of standard plugins to discover and gather cloud-to-edge metrics and status across your whole IT infrastructure.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: darold/ora2pg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/darold/ora2pg
Language: perl
Ora2Pg is a free tool used to migrate an Oracle database to a PostgreSQL compatible schema. It connects your Oracle database, scan it automatically and extracts its structure or data, it then generates SQL scripts that you can load into PostgreSQL.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ddclient/ddclient
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ddclient/ddclient
Language: perl
ddclient updates dynamic DNS entries for accounts on a wide range of dynamic DNS services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dgl/cgiirc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dgl/cgiirc
Language: perl
CGI:IRC web based IRC client

ns0:entry.ns0:title: docker-library/repo-info
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/docker-library/repo-info
Language: perl
Extended information (especially license and layer details) about the published Official Images

ns0:entry.ns0:title: exiftool/exiftool
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/exiftool/exiftool
Language: perl
ExifTool meta information reader/writer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fusioninventory/fusioninventory-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fusioninventory/fusioninventory-agent
Language: perl
FusionInventory Agent

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi-agent
Language: perl

ns0:entry.ns0:title: holzschu/a-shell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/holzschu/a-shell
Language: perl
A terminal for iOS, with multiple windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: inverse-inc/packetfence
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/inverse-inc/packetfence
Language: perl
PacketFence is a fully supported, trusted, Free and Open Source network access control (NAC) solution. Boasting an impressive feature set including a captive-portal for registration and remediation, centralized wired and wireless management, powerful BYOD management options, 802.1X support, layer-2 isolation of problematic devices; PacketFence c…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: linux-test-project/lcov
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/linux-test-project/lcov
Language: perl
LCOV

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yaml/yaml-test-suite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yaml/yaml-test-suite
Language: perl
